subject: grammar
title: Exercise — Future Continuous (Class Survey Chart)
instruction:
The following chart shows the results of a class survey about planned activities for Saturday afternoon. Complete the sentences using the future continuous tense.

Note: Questions 7–10 are open-ended personal questions (answers will vary).

questions.text: The largest group of students ___ this Saturday afternoon.
A similar number of students ___ this weekend.
A similar number of students will be doing sport and ___ this weekend.
A very small number of students ___ this weekend.
